channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Miley Cyrus Reflects on Hannah Montana, Music, and Life Lessons Ahead of Walk of Fame Honor
item.description: Miley Cyrus, Grammy-winning singer and former Disney Channel star, is set to receive a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame on May 22, 2026. The announcement comes shortly after the 20th anniversary spe...

item.title: Joseph Selasini Resigns from NCCR-Mageuzi and Returns to Chadema Citing Political Differences
item.description: Former Rombo Member of Parliament Joseph Selasini has officially left NCCR-Mageuzi and gone back to Chadema party. He made the announcement in Arusha on May 22, 2026, calling his previous departure a ...

item.title: Shiksha Arora: Kenyan TV personality and her family story
item.description: Shiksha Arora is a Kenyan media personality of Indian descent who has become popular for her energetic presence on TV and social media. Born and raised in Kenya, Shiksha identifies as Sikh and belongs...

item.title: Former Bureaucrats Raise Concerns Over CJI’s Remarks on Environmental Activists
item.description: A group of retired civil servants in India has expressed serious concern over comments made by Chief Justice Surya Kant during a hearing related to the Pipavav port expansion project in Gujarat. On Ma...

item.title: Australian Jewish Activist Highlights Anti-Zionist Jews Facing Hostility
item.description: Judith Treanor, an Australian-British Jewish activist, has publicly shared her experiences of antisemitism from Zionist groups due to her outspoken opposition to Israeli government policies. Treanor e...

item.title: Jody Yeh: Mum of Chef Molly Yeh and Her Journey from Music to Social Work
item.description: Jody Yeh, born on 16 October 1955 in the USA, is the mother of American celebrity chef and blogger Molly Yeh. She is of Hungarian-Jewish descent and grew up partly in New York before moving to Gurnee,...

item.title: Religious Values Promote Peace and Unity in Post-Election Tanzania
item.description: After the October 2025 General Election, Tanzania experienced unrest in several areas, highlighting the importance of faith and moral teachings in rebuilding trust and unity. Religious leaders across ...

item.title: Senator Pia Cayetano Shares She Has Moved On After Emotional Senate Moment
item.description: Senator Pia Cayetano addressed the public through a Facebook Live session, stating that she has already moved on from her emotional breakdown during a Senate session last May 20. The incident happened...

item.title: Marumo Gallants and Stellenbosch FC face crucial Premiership clash in Bloemfontein
item.description: Marumo Gallants are gearing up for a critical Betway Premiership encounter against Stellenbosch FC at the Seisa Ramabodu Stadium on Saturday. The Bloemfontein-based side is battling relegation, curren...

item.title: Tulsi Gabbard resigns from Trump administration citing family health reasons
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard, the US director of national intelligence under President Donald Trump, has resigned from her position, citing her husband's battle with a rare form of bone cancer. She is the fourth mem...

item.title: Examining Mental Healthcare Access and Schizophrenia Support in South Africa
item.description: As World Schizophrenia Day approaches on 24 May, attention is once again drawn to the challenges facing mental healthcare in South Africa. Schizophrenia, a complex neurological condition, affects perc...

item.title: ICC Orders Duterte to Stay Detained Pending Trial in The Hague
item.description: Former Philippine president Rodrigo Duterte will continue to be detained at the International Criminal Court (ICC) in The Hague for another year. The ICC Trial Chamber III ruled that Duterte does not ...

item.title: WHO Raises Ebola Alert in DR Congo Amid Rising Cases
item.description: The World Health Organisation (WHO) has raised the Ebola outbreak risk in the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) to the highest level, calling the situation deeply concerning. Currently, there are abo...

item.title: La Réunion and South Africa: Decades of Missed Cooperation
item.description: Over forty years ago, leaders from La Réunion secretly supported Nelson Mandela’s ANC, with Paul Vergès even securing early European sanctions against apartheid South Africa. Despite this shared histo...

item.title: Government to review sentences of three boys convicted of rape following public outcry
item.description: The UK government has announced a review of the sentences handed to three boys, aged 14 and 15, who were convicted of raping two girls in separate incidents in Fordingbridge, Hampshire. The boys recei...

item.title: Rising Beef Prices Impact Summer BBQs in Canada
item.description: As Canadians prepare for summer barbecues, beef prices remain significantly higher than previous years, with costs up 62.6 per cent since 2021. The increase is largely due to several years of drought ...

item.title: Tulsi Gabbard steps down as US intelligence chief due to husband's illness
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard announced her resignation from the post of Director of National Intelligence under President Donald Trump, citing her husband's recent diagnosis with a rare type of bone cancer as the re...

item.title: Beloved TV Presenter Judith Chalmers Passes Away at 90
item.description: Judith Chalmers, the cherished British television presenter renowned for hosting ITV's long-running travel programme Wish You Were Here...?, has passed away at the age of 90. Her family announced that...

item.title: Canada Implements Enhanced Ebola Screening at Airports Following Negative Ontario Case
item.description: Canada has implemented enhanced screening measures at airports for travellers returning from African countries affected by a recent Ebola outbreak. This step follows the proactive testing of an indivi...

item.title: Quinta Brunson to develop and star in Betty Boop’s first major film in decades
item.description: Quinta Brunson, known for her Emmy-winning comedy series Abbott Elementary and her voice role as Dr Fuzzby in Zootopia 2, is set to both develop and star in a new Betty Boop feature film. This upcomin...
